overview: RepoEval Pro is a production-grade GitHub repository evaluation platform for hiring teams. It deterministically scores candidate submissions against assignment criteria, providing recruiter-grade verdicts, role-wise analytics dashboards with visual breakdowns, and exportable candidate briefs.
features: Professional analytics dashboard with KPI summary cards (total evaluations, avg score, pass/caution/fail rates)
Role-wise bar charts showing average scores by role
Score trend line chart over time for tracking evaluation patterns
Pass/Caution/Fail distribution pie chart for at-a-glance hiring health
7-dimension metric breakdown per role (coverage, stack match, completeness, depth, docs, demo, AI usage)
Dynamic role filter pills that update all visualizations instantly
Batch comparison table with color-coded score badges
Deterministic evaluation engine with recruiter verdict (Hire/No-Hire)
Persistent evaluation history with owner identification
File upload support for PDF, DOCX, TXT assignments
Export candidate briefs and role reports as CSV/HTML
